name: Artichoke & Cracked Wheat Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain artichoke hearts and reserve 3 tablespoons of the liquid.
2. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
3. Pour the mixture into your bread machine in the following order: flour, yeast, sugar, salt, cracked wheat, water (warm), and Parmesan.
4. Set the "baking control" at 10 o'clock.
5. Select "white bread" and push Start.
6. In hot and humid weather, use 1/8 cup less water.
7. The flavor of this loaf is not too assertive, but the texture is substantial, making it a good sandwich bread for spicy meats like salami or pate, and ripe cheese.
8. For early in the day eating, toast and spread with orange marmalade or apple butter.
